eventMetadata.context_description: **CFTC guidance and court rulings have opened the door for designated contract markets (DCMs) to self-certify sports event contracts.** In March 2026, the Division of Market Oversight issued an advisory urging DCMs to engage sports leagues pre-certification, secure data-sharing MOUs—like CME's with MLB—implement anti-manipulation safeguards, and use official settlement sources before listing these binary prediction market products. A Third Circuit decision in early April affirmed exclusive CFTC jurisdiction over DCM-traded sports event contracts, preempting state gambling laws and bolstering Kalshi's prior self-certifications. With the June 30 resolution approaching, traders eye potential filings from emerging DCMs amid ongoing ANPRM on prediction market rules, though CFTC can still stay listings. No major self-certifications reported in the past month.

markets.question: Bill Clinton divorce by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Bill Clinton and/or Hillary Clinton announce their intention to divorce by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

An announcement by the specified date of their intention to divorce will be sufficient for a "Yes" resolution, regardless of whether the divorce later actually occurs, or whether the actual divorce occurs outside of the timeframe of this market.

The resolution source will be statements from Bill Clinton and/or Hillary Clinton, and their representatives, however a definitive consensus of credible media reporting may be considered.

events.title: Bill Clinton divorce by June 30?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if Bill Clinton and/or Hillary Clinton announce their intention to divorce by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

An announcement by the specified date of their intention to divorce will be sufficient for a "Yes" resolution, regardless of whether the divorce later actually occurs, or whether the actual divorce occurs outside of the timeframe of this market.

The resolution source will be statements from Bill Clinton and/or Hillary Clinton, and their representatives, however a definitive consensus of credible media reporting may be considered.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus implies a near-certain no divorce announcement by June 30, driven by the complete absence of any official statements, legal filings, or credible reports from Bill or Hillary Clinton in recent months, despite early 2026 tabloid speculation fueled by House Oversight Committee depositions on Jeffrey Epstein ties. The couple, wed since 1975 and marking their 50th anniversary last October, quashed rumors with a public date night in New York City on March 10 amid photo leaks from the hearings. No developments have emerged in the past 30 days, underscoring their history of enduring scandals. Realistic shifts would require a late-breaking personal announcement, health crisis, or unforeseen legal pressure before the deadline.

markets.question: Will A Just Russia – For Truth (SRZP) win the second-most seats in the next Russian parliamentary election?
markets.description:
Parliamentary elections are scheduled to be held in Russia in September 2026.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the second greatest number of seats in the next Russian State Duma election.

If the results are not known definitively by September 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The named parties or coalitions will be primarily ranked by the number of seats won in the specified election. If two or more parties are tied on seats, ties will be broken by the total number of valid votes received, with higher vote totals ranking higher. If parties remain tied, ties will be broken by alphabetical order of the listed party abbreviations. This market will resolve to the party that occupies the second finishing position after applying this ranking.

This market's resolution will be based solely on the number of seats won by the named party in the State Duma of the Federal Assembly of the Russian Federation.

This market will resolve based on the results of this election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results reported by Russian government sources such as the Central Election Commission of the Russian Federation.

Note: If a listed party contests the election as part of a jointly listed coalition with one or more parties not listed in this market, the market corresponding to the listed party will represent the coalition and will count all seats won by the coalition collectively. If two or more listed parties contest the election as a jointly listed coalition, with or without additional parties not listed in this market, the market corresponding to the party within that coalition that won the most seats in the previous election will represent the coalition and will count all seats won by the coalition collectively. If such a coalition dissolves, each market will again represent its respective party individually.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus favors the Communist Party of the Russian Federation (KPRF) for second-most seats in the September 2026 State Duma election at 34.5%, closely trailed by New People (NL) at 31% and Liberal Democratic Party of Russia (LDPR) at 26.5%, reflecting a tight contest among systemic opposition parties behind dominant United Russia. Recent VCIOM polls through mid-April show NL surging to 13.4% in proportional list voting intentions, overtaking LDPR (10.1%) and matching KPRF (10.9%), fueled by party conventions and Kremlin-backed promotion as a middle-class alternative amid economic pressures eroding ER support. KPRF holds an edge via historical strength in single-member districts, but regional arrests of its activists and LDPR's nationalist appeals keep the race fragmented. Separation could arise from federal party list approvals, electronic primaries, or shifts in undecided voters (10-20%) ahead of the campaign launch.

markets.question: Como 1907 vs. SSC Napoli: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming Serie A game between Como 1907 and SSC Napoli, scheduled for May 2 at 12:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Como 1907 and SSC Napoli combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on legaseriea.it. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Como 1907 vs. SSC Napoli - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Serie A game, scheduled for May 2 at 12:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: SSC Napoli, defending Serie A champions and second in the standings with around 66 points after 30 matches, visit surging fourth-placed Como 1907 on May 3 at Stadio Giuseppe Sinigaglia. Como's fairy-tale season features robust home form—nine wins in 16 league games—and unbeaten recent head-to-heads against Napoli, including a 2-1 league victory earlier this term, a 0-0 draw, and a dramatic Coppa Italia quarterfinal penalty win in February. Napoli boast strong away results but grapple with injuries to Romelu Lukaku (muscle, late April), Giovanni Di Lorenzo (knee), Amir Rrahmani (thigh), and Antonio Vergara (foot), potentially disrupting their lineup amid a tight Champions League race. Both enter unbeaten in their last three Serie A outings.

markets.question: Israel x Hamas ceasefire cancelled by June 30?
markets.description:
On October 9, 2025 Israel and Hamas signed a deal implementing a ceasefire: https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/israel-hamas-agree-gaza-ceasefire-return-hostages-2025-10-09/

This market will resolve to "Yes" if a either Israel or Hamas announce the cancellation of the ongoing ceasefire, or if a consensus of credible reporting confirms that the ceasefire is no longer in effect, by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise this market will resolve to "No".

Announcements that one side or another violated the ongoing ceasefire will not be enough to resolve this market to "Yes"; only a definitive announcement by Israel or Hamas, or otherwise a wide consensus of credible reporting that that the ceasefire has been ended, will qualify to resolve this market to "Yes".

The primary solution resolution source will be official information from Hamas or the government of Israel, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: Israel x Hamas ceasefire cancelled by...?
events.description:
On October 9, Israel and Hamas signed a deal implementing a ceasefire: https://www.reuters.com/world/middle-east/israel-hamas-agree-gaza-ceasefire-return-hostages-2025-10-09/

This market will resolve to "Yes" if a either Israel or Hamas announce the cancellation of the ongoing ceasefire, or if a consensus of credible reporting confirms that the ceasefire is no longer in effect, by October 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise this market will resolve to "No".

Announcements that one side or another violated the ongoing ceasefire will not be enough to resolve this market to "Yes"; only a definitive announcement by Israel or Hamas, or otherwise a wide consensus of credible reporting that that the ceasefire has been ended, will qualify to resolve this market to "Yes".

The primary solution resolution source will be official information from Hamas or the government of Israel, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: A fragile Israel-Hamas ceasefire in Gaza, effective since late 2025 under a U.S.-brokered peace plan, persists amid mutual violations and deadlock over Hamas disarmament and governance. Hamas rejected the disarmament clause on April 14, 2026, citing Israeli non-compliance, while the IDF reported 14 violations by April 16; over 2,000 breaches have been documented since October 2025. Regional de-escalations, including extended Israel-Lebanon and Iran ceasefires announced last week, have refocused attention on Gaza's impasse. Traders monitor IDF operations, potential airstrikes, diplomatic negotiations, and next-phase talks for signals of cancellation by Israel, Hamas, or mediators like the U.S., with no major breakdown yet but rising tensions from Hezbollah activities.

markets.question: Will FURIA win CBLOL 2026 Split 1?
markets.description:

If the 2026 Split 1 is postponed after June 13, 2026 11:59 PM ET, canceled, or a winner has not been declared in this timeframe, this market will resolve to "Other".

If multiple teams are declared winner, this market will resolve in favor of the team whose listed team name comes first alphabetically.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Riot Games (https://lolesports.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

If the 2026 Split 1 is postponed after June 13, 2026 11:59 PM ET, canceled, or a winner has not been declared in this timeframe, this market will resolve to "Other".

If multiple teams are declared winner, this market will resolve in favor of the team whose listed team name comes first alphabetically.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Riot Games (https://lolesports.com/); however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices Vivo Keyd Stars, Fluxo W7M, and RED Canids nearly even at around 47% implied probability to win CBLOL 2026 Split 1, underscoring the razor-thin margins in the looming double-elimination playoffs despite RED Canids' flawless 6-0 regular season record capped by a dominant 2-0 sweep of LOS last weekend. Fluxo W7M rides a three-series win streak after dismantling paiN Gaming 2-0, while Keyd Stars solidified its top-four contention with a clean 2-0 over Leviatán, highlighting consistent macro play and carry threats across the trio. The BO5 playoff format—with top-two byes to round two—amplifies upset potential, as recent head-to-heads and game differentials reveal parity in draft execution and clutch performances among these frontrunners.

markets.question: Will NYC Mayor post 200+ posts from May 1 to May 8, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the number of times NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani (@NYCMayor), posts on X between May 1, 12:00 PM ET and May 8, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts will count.

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies which are recorded on the main feed will be counted by the tracker.

Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes).

The resolution source for this market is the "Post Counter" figure for posts found at https://xtracker.polymarket.com. Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source.

markets.question: Will Aston Villa FC win on 2026-04-30?

events.title: Nottingham Forest FC vs. Aston Villa FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming UEFA Europa League game, scheduled for Thursday, April 30, 2026 between Nottingham Forest FC and Aston Villa FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Nottingham Forest hold a slight edge as home favorites in this UEFA Europa League semi-final first leg at City Ground, with trader consensus reflecting tight odds amid mutual injury woes and strong recent European form for both sides. Forest manager Vitor Pereira confirmed defender Murillo is sidelined with a hamstring issue, joining Callum Hudson-Odoi (quadriceps), Willy Boly, and Nicolo Savona on the absentee list, while Ibrahim Sangaré, Dan Ndoye, and striker Jair Cunha remain fitness doubts ahead of kickoff. Aston Villa face uncertainty over Amadou Onana's availability, with Boubacar Kamara out long-term (knee) and Ross Barkley nursing issues, offsetting Unai Emery's selection options. Forest's solid home record against Villa (28 wins in 69 H2H) and mid-table Premier League positioning—Forest 16th, Villa around 5th—keep the matchup competitively balanced, pricing a draw as a viable outcome in this high-stakes regional derby.

series.title: Kharg Island oil terminal be hit

eventMetadata.context_description: US airstrikes on April 7 targeted over 50 military sites on Kharg Island—including bunkers, radar stations, and weapons depots—while explicitly sparing the oil terminal, which handles 90% of Iran's crude exports and continues loading operations per satellite data. This follows similar March strikes amid the broader US-Iran conflict, driven by Iran's Strait of Hormuz restrictions and President Trump's ultimatums threatening energy infrastructure if shipping lanes remain blocked. No kinetic strike has hit the terminal itself in the past 30 days, sustaining trader focus on de-escalation signals, potential ground operations, or diplomatic breakthroughs before month-end deadlines that could spike oil prices.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Miami be between 80-81°F on April 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Miami Intl Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 30 Apr '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Miami Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/fl/miami/KMIA.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will Apple (AAPL) hit (LOW) $260 Week of April 27 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during the week of April 27 2026, any 1-minute candle for Apple (AAPL) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Apple (AAPL) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.AAPL%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.AAPL%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

events.title: What will Apple (AAPL) hit Week of April 27 2026?

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment for Apple (AAPL) share price targets during the week of April 27 centers on tomorrow's Q2 FY2026 earnings release after market close on April 30, with consensus analyst estimates calling for $109 billion in revenue and $1.93 earnings per share, reflecting 14-16% year-over-year growth driven by iPhone and Mac demand. Polymarket's crowd-sourced odds aggregate real capital at stake, pricing in post-earnings volatility on May 1 that could test key technical levels around $272 resistance and $268 support, against a backdrop of steady tech sector momentum and 32x forward P/E valuation.

markets.question: Will the Republicans win the South Carolina Senate race in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the winner of the 2026 midterm South Carolina U.S. Senate election, inclusive of any run-offs.

A candidate shall be considered to represent a party in the event that he or she is the nominee of the party in question. Candidates other than the Democratic or Republican nominee (e.g., Greens, Libertarian, independent) may be added at a later date.

Candidates who run as independents will not be encompassed by the “Democrat” or “Republican” options regardless of any affiliation they may have with the party.

The resolution source for this market is the Associated Press, Fox News, and NBC. This market will resolve once all three sources call the race for the same candidate. If all three sources haven’t called the race in this state for the same candidate, this market will resolve based on the official certification.

eventMetadata.context_description: Incumbent Republican Senator Lindsey Graham's dominant position as the likely GOP primary winner on June 9 drives trader consensus toward a Republican hold in South Carolina's solidly red Senate race, with forecasters like Cook Political Report rating it Solid Republican and Sabato's Crystal Ball deeming it Safe. Graham's fundraising edge—$20.7 million raised versus challenger Mark Lynch's $5.7 million—combined with Donald Trump's endorsement, bolsters his path despite recent polls showing a 41-21 primary lead. Paul Dans's April 10 withdrawal and endorsement of Lynch failed to consolidate opposition significantly. General election surveys, including a Democrat-sponsored Impact Research poll from late February to early March showing Graham ahead of Annie Andrews 47-42, underscore the state's partisan tilt favoring the incumbent despite narrow margins.

Kathy Hochul on April 13 and ex-Mayor Michael Bloomberg's $5 million super PAC commitment, alongside Nadler's backing, enhancing his fundraising in this crowded field. Recent forums underscore policy contrasts in this competitive East Side-West Side contest.

markets.question: LoL: Shifters vs Team Vitality (BO3) - Esports World Cup EMEA Qualifier Playoffs
markets.description:
This market refers to the LoL Lower bracket round 1 match between Shifters and Team Vitality in the Esports World Cup EMEA Qualifier Playoffs, initially scheduled for April 30 at 11:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Shifters" if Shifters win the match against Team Vitality.

This market will resolve to "Team Vitality" if Team Vitality win the match against Shifters.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://gol.gg/esports/home. However, if https://gol.gg/esports/home has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

Vitality dropped after a 1-2 upset to Movistar KOI yesterday, squandering a 12k gold lead in game 3 via Humanoid's overextension, allowing a devastating Baron, Dragon Soul, and Elder Dragon comeback despite strong showings from Naak Nako and Carzzy. Vitality's proven roster—Lyncas, Humanoid, Carzzy, Fleshy—contrasts Shifters' lineup of Rooster, Boukada, nuc, Paduck, Trymbi, amid recent LEC head-to-heads marked by Shifters upsets.

markets.question: Will Yoo Dong-soo win the 2026 Incheon mayoral election?
markets.description:
The Incheon mayoral election is scheduled to take place in Incheon, South Korea on June 3, 2026 to elect the next mayor of Incheon. 

This market will resolve according to the candidate that wins this election.

If the result of this election isn't known by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the South Korean government, specifically the National Election Commission (https://www.nec.go.kr/).

As a three-term lawmaker and party-nominated frontrunner aligned with progressive leadership, Park's April 22 official campaign launch—pledging AI, biotech, K-culture, and job creation in Songdo—has solidified momentum amid regional economic priorities. This reflects skin-in-the-game bets on DPK's regional strength five weeks before the June 3 local election. Upsets could arise from scandals, a conservative national swing, Yoo's incumbent advantages in turnout, or undecided voter shifts.

markets.question: Ayo Dosunmu: Points O/U 19.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for April 30 at 12:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Ayo Dosunmu scores more than 19.5 points during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if Ayo Dosunmu scores 19.5 points or fewer during the game.

The entire game including all overtime periods will be considered.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

If the player is listed as inactive or otherwise does not take the court at any point, the market will resolve "No".

The resolution source will be the official NBA box score as published on NBA.com.

events.title: Nuggets vs. Timberwolves
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for April 30 at 12:00AM ET:
If the Nuggets win, the market will resolve to "Nuggets".
If the Timberwolves win, the market will resolve to "Timberwolves".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

eventMetadata.context_description: Timberwolves lead the Nuggets 3-2 in their Western Conference first-round playoff series, but Minnesota faces a depleted roster for Game 6 in Minneapolis on April 30, with Anthony Edwards sidelined by a knee injury from Game 4 and Donte DiVincenzo out for the season after a torn Achilles. Denver capitalized in Game 5 at Ball Arena, dominating 125-113 behind Nikola Jokić's 27 points, 16 assists, and 12 rebounds plus Jamal Murray's 24 points, trimming the deficit despite Aaron Gordon's ongoing calf issue. Nuggets' home-court edge shifts to Minnesota's crowd support, but trader consensus reflects Denver's momentum and healthier lineup amid the Timberwolves' injury crisis and recent form slump.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Shenzhen be 20°C or below on May 1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Shenzhen Bao'an International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 1 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Shenzhen Bao'an International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/shenzhen/ZGSZ.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket tilts toward a 27°C high in Shenzhen on May 1 at 34.5% implied probability, closely trailed by 26°C at 27.0%, reflecting forecast model ensembles showing peak daytime temperatures in the 26–28°C range amid persistent cloud cover and late-day shower risks. Recent updates from global models like those powering timeanddate.com (28°C high, overcast) and yr.no (28°C max) indicate suppressed diurnal heating due to high humidity, southerly moisture influx from the South China Sea, and weak frontal influences limiting solar insolation—the primary driver differentiating outcomes. Climatological early-May highs average 29°C, but current overcast conditions (21–73% precip chance across sources) create uncertainty; clearer skies could push toward 28°C, while heavier showers favor 26°C or below. Watch CMA and model refreshes overnight for shifts ahead of resolution.

markets.question: Will Analilia Mejia win the NJ-11 Special Election by 40% or more?
markets.description:
The special election for the seat for New Jersey's 11th congressional district in the U.S. House of Representatives is currently scheduled to take place on April 16, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the margin of victory between the top two candidates in the specified election.

For the purpose of this market, the “margin of victory” is defined as the absolute difference between the percentages of valid votes received by the first-place and second-place candidates. Percentages of the valid votes received by each candidate will be determined by dividing the total number of valid votes each of the top two candidates receives by the sum of all valid votes cast in the election.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher placed bracket.

If two or more candidates tie for the most valid votes in this election, and the tie is between two candidates listed, this market will resolve to the lowest margin bracket for the candidate whose listed last name comes first in alphabetical order. If the tie is between a listed candidate and an unlisted candidate, this market will resolve to the lowest margin bracket for the listed candidate. If the tie is between two or more unlisted candidates, this market will resolve to “Other.”

This market will resolve based on the official vote count once the count has been made official.

If the results of the specified election are not known definitively by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official sources, including https://www.nj.gov/state/.

If a recount is initiated before the vote total has been made official, the market will remain open until the recount is completed and the vote is made official.

events.title: NJ-11 Special Election: Margin of Victory
events.description:
The special election for the seat for New Jersey's 11th congressional district in the U.S. House of Representatives is currently scheduled to take place on April 16, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the margin of victory between the top two candidates in the specified election.

For the purpose of this market, the “margin of victory” is defined as the absolute difference between the percentages of valid votes received by the first-place and second-place candidates. Percentages of the valid votes received by each candidate will be determined by dividing the total number of valid votes each of the top two candidates receives by the sum of all valid votes cast in the election.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher placed bracket.

If two or more candidates tie for the most valid votes in this election, and the tie is between two candidates listed, this market will resolve to the lowest margin bracket for the candidate whose listed last name comes first in alphabetical order. If the tie is between a listed candidate and an unlisted candidate, this market will resolve to the lowest margin bracket for the listed candidate. If the tie is between two or more unlisted candidates, this market will resolve to “Other.”

This market will resolve based on the official vote count once the count has been made official.

If the results of the specified election are not known definitively by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official sources, including https://www.nj.gov/state/.

If a recount is initiated before the vote total has been made official, the market will remain open until the recount is completed and the vote is made official.

eventMetadata.context_description: Democrat Analilia Mejia's commanding 94.5% implied probability for a 20-25% margin of victory in New Jersey's 11th Congressional District special election stems from post-April 16 vote tallies showing her lead at 20.7% as of April 24, bolstered by late-counted provisional and mail ballots that flipped key areas like Passaic County's portion—unprecedented for modern Democrats there. The safely Democratic district, where Kamala Harris led by roughly 12 points in 2024, saw Mejia overperform amid low-turnout conditions typical of House specials favoring incumbents. Weaker Republican turnout against challenger Joe Hathaway further entrenched her position. Realistic challenges include substantial remaining GOP-leaning ballots or certification disputes, though trends point to stability above 20%.

markets.question: Will Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) hit (LOW) $300 in May?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, at any point during May 2026, any 1-minute candle for Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) has a final "Low" price equal to or below the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Only prices achieved during the regular trading hours of the primary exchange on which the listed security trades (typically 9:30 AM – 4:00 PM ET) will be considered. Prices occurring during pre-market or after-hours trading will not qualify.

Prices will be used exactly as published by Pyth, without rounding.

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Pyth.

The target price will be adjusted proportionally to reflect any stock splits. Resolution will be based on the historical price data as shown on Pyth after any adjustments have been applied.

The resolution source for this market is Pyth — specifically, the Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) "Low" prices available at https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.TSLA%2FUSD, with the chart settings configured for 1-minute candles.

Historical 1-minute candles may be accessed by appending a Unix timestamp (seconds) to the Pyth chart URL using the "t=" parameter. Any timestamp within the listed market time frame may be used to view the relevant candle data (e.g., https://pythdata.app/explore/Equity.US.TSLA%2FUSD?t=1773432000)

If the relevant Pyth data is unavailable due to a system outage, data failure, or other technical disruption that prevents verification of the required 1-minute candle data, the official daily low price published by the primary exchange on which the listed security trades will be used to determine whether the listed price was reached during the applicable trading session.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Sao Paulo be 29°C on April 29?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Sao Paulo-Guarulhos International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 29 Apr '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Sao Paulo-Guarulhos International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/br/guarulhos/SBGR.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket overwhelmingly favors a highest temperature of 29°C in São Paulo on April 29, backed by aligned forecasts from Brazil's National Institute of Meteorology (INMET) and CPTEC, alongside AccuWeather models projecting peaks of 28–29°C under partly cloudy skies. Following the departure of a recent cold front that brought showers and cooler air, partial solar insolation amid light winds and morning lows near 20°C supports this moderate warming trend, consistent with April climatology where highs average 25°C but vary with synoptic patterns. Realistic challenges include afternoon isolated thunderstorms capping heating below 29°C or unexpectedly clear skies boosting it to 30°C; hourly observations from official stations will refine certainty as the afternoon peak approaches.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket heavily favors the Partido Liberal (PL) at 79% implied probability to win the most seats among the 54 up for renewal in Brazil's October 4, 2026, Senate election, driven by its ascent to the largest Senate bloc in January 2026 via switches and further expansion to 101 Chamber deputies after the April 3 party window closed. Recent state polls from March (Paraná Pesquisas, Quaest, Datafolha) highlight PL pre-candidates like Michelle Bolsonaro (36% in DF), Cláudio Castro (23% in RJ), and Carlos Bolsonaro (21% in SC) leading or contending, signaling broad right-wing momentum amid Flávio Bolsonaro's tight presidential race with Lula. Smaller parties like NOVO (12.6%) and UNIÃO Brasil (11.1%) draw support as all their seats face full renewal, while PT trails at 2.6% amid weaker showings.

eventMetadata.context_description: Al Ittihad's sixth-place standing in the Saudi Pro League table versus Al Shabab's 12th position, combined with an unbeaten streak in their last five head-to-head meetings (five wins), positions traders to favor the visitors at 64% implied probability for an away win at Al Shabab Club Stadium. Recent injury updates bolster Ittihad's edge, with Youssef En-Nesyri cleared after medical checks and Saleh Al-Shehri nearing return from a calf issue, while suspensions for Danilo and Moussa Diaby were served in last weekend's match against Al-Taawoun. Al Shabab, showing mixed home form (50% win rate), contends with Vincent Sierro's ongoing muscle strain and long-term absences like Carlos Junior's abdominal injury, keeping their home win at 49.5% and draw at a slim 20% in closely watched trader consensus.

markets.question: Will the Democratic Party win the IL-09 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the IL-09 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors the Democratic Party at 92.5% implied probability for the IL-09 House seat, driven by the district's longstanding Democratic stronghold status—encompassing liberal North Shore suburbs like Evanston and Rogers Park with a Cook Partisan Voting Index rating it solidly blue. Longtime Rep. Jan Schakowsky's May 2025 retirement opened the race, but former state Sen. Daniel Biss's March 17, 2026, primary victory over 15 rivals solidified a strong nominee with robust fundraising and local endorsements. Weak Republican opposition, including low-profile nominee John Elleson, reinforces this positioning absent national midterm dynamics. Potential shifts could arise from late scandals, health issues, or a dramatic GOP wave, though historical precedents in D+25 districts suggest high barriers to flipping. The general election is November 3, 2026.

markets.question: US x Iran diplomatic meeting by May 15, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there is a diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran by the listed date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify. 

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not count.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

The resolution sources for this market will be official information from the governments of the United States and Iran, and a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: US-Iran diplomatic negotiations remain stalled after the first direct high-level talks since 1979 in Islamabad, Pakistan, on April 11-12, where US envoys including Vice President JD Vance, Steve Witkoff, and Jared Kushner met Iranian officials led by Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Parliament Speaker Mohammad Baqher Ghalibaf. No agreement emerged on reopening the Strait of Hormuz, curbing nuclear enrichment, or lifting sanctions, amid ongoing ceasefire. President Trump rejected Tehran's revised proposal on April 27, prompting Araghchi to blame Washington during April 27-28 meetings with Russian President Putin. No next-round date is set, with mutual stalling accusations from US allies like Germany's foreign minister; traders watch for potential breakthroughs before any June deadline amid extended truce risks.

markets.question: Will Apple (AAPL) close above $220 end of April?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the official closing price for Apple (AAPL) on the final trading day of April 2026 is higher than the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If the final trading day of the month is shortened (for example, due to a market-holiday schedule), the official closing price published for that shortened session will still be used for resolution.

If no official closing price is published for that session (for example, due to a trading halt into the close, system issue, or other disruption), the market will use the last valid on-exchange trade price of the regular session as the effective closing price.

The resolution source for this market is Yahoo Finance — specifically, the Apple (AAPL) "Close" prices available at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/AAPL/history, published under "Historical Prices."

In the event of a stock split, reverse stock split, or similar corporate action affecting the listed company during the listed time frame, this market will resolve based on split-adjusted prices as displayed on Yahoo Finance.

eventMetadata.context_description: Apple (AAPL) shares closed at $269.77 on April 29, 2026, amid heightened volatility ahead of the fiscal Q2 earnings release after market close on April 30—the resolution date for end-of-April pricing. Trader consensus on Polymarket reflects positioning around expectations for iPhone revenue of approximately $56.5 billion and accelerating services growth, emphasized by the new CEO as the next engine, with recent UBS price target hike to reflect supply chain improvements for iPhone storage components. Analyst average targets stand at $296–$302, versus the current share price, supported by S&P 500 levels near 7,100; however, unusual pre-earnings put activity signals caution on potential misses amid broader market dynamics. Post-earnings guidance will influence May momentum, but April 30 close hinges on intraday sentiment.

markets.question: Will Benfica finish 2nd in the Primeira Liga for the 2025-26 season?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed club finishes 2nd in the final standings of the 2025-2026 Primeira Liga season. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve to the team officially recognized by Primeira Liga as finishing in second place. If multiple teams are officially awarded second place, the market will resolve to the team whose listed name comes first alphabetically.

If at any point it becomes impossible for the listed club to finish 2nd in the 2025-2026 Primeira Liga season (e.g. they are mathematically unable to achieve enough points), the market will resolve to "No".

If the 2025-2026 Primeira Liga season is cancelled, postponed after June 7, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no 2nd place team declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source will be official information from Primeira Liga. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors Benfica at 69.5% implied probability for Primeira Liga second place, driven by their current table lead over Sporting CP—75 points from 31 matches versus Sporting's 72 from 30—bolstered by a vital 2-1 away win at Sporting on April 19 that secured head-to-head tiebreaker advantage even if Sporting wins their game in hand. Benfica's remarkable 31-game unbeaten league streak under Mourinho underscores their momentum, while Sporting's recent draw against relegated AVS on April 26 eroded their challenge, dropping points in a winnable fixture. FC Porto's commanding first-place position with 82 points leaves them at just 0.9% for second, as focus shifts to Benfica controlling their Champions League playoff destiny amid similar remaining fixtures.

markets.question: Cagliari: Aleksandar Kovacevic vs Marcos Giron
markets.description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Aleksandar Kovacevic and Marcos Giron in the Cagliari, originally scheduled for April 30, 2026 at 10:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Aleksandar Kovacevic' if Aleksandar Kovacevic advances against Marcos Giron.

This market will resolve to 'Marcos Giron' if Marcos Giron advances against Aleksandar Kovacevic.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the ATP Tour. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus reflects a razor-thin edge for Aleksandar Kovacevic at 50% implied probability in this ATP Challenger Cagliari round-of-16 clay matchup against eighth seed Marcos Giron (ATP No. 76 to Kovacevic's No. 97), balancing their modest career clay records—Kovacevic 24-33 lifetime, Giron 36-50. Both notched straight-sets wins in the round of 32: Giron rallied past higher-ranked Aleksandar Vukic 6-4, 1-6, 6-1 on April 28, showcasing resilience, while Kovacevic grinded out a 6-3, 7-6(6) decision over qualifier Luca Potenza on April 29. Giron leads their lone head-to-head 1-0 from 2023 Indian Wells hardcourt, but first clay meeting evens stylistic matchup between the right-handers. Momentum from Giron's recent challenger final or Kovacevic's Indian Wells upsets over Hurkacz and Moutet keeps it competitive; late injury reports or outdoor weather shifts could tip probabilities.

markets.question: Will "The Great Divide" - Noah Kahan debut week album sales be less than 125k?
markets.description:
Noah Kahan's new album 'The Great Divide' is scheduled to be released on April 24, 2026.

This market will resolve according to the debut week sales for Noah Kahan's album 'The Great Divide', according to Hits Daily Double.

If the album 'The Great Divide' has not been released by May 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to the lowest bracket.
 
If the album’s debut week sales fall exactly between two brackets, this market will resolve to the higher bracket.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the "HITS TOP 50" list found at https://hitsdailydouble.com/sales_plus_streaming, specifically, the figure in the column titled "Activity", once the results are finalized for the album’s debut week. If this resolution source becomes permanently unavailable, another credible resolution source may be chosen.

eventMetadata.context_description: Midweek forecasts from Hits Daily Double have solidified trader consensus around Noah Kahan's "The Great Divide" exceeding 250,000 first-week units on the Billboard 200, with projections now at 335,000 total equivalent albums (TEA) including 152,000 pure sales, fueled by a blockbuster 43.5 million first-day global Spotify streams across 17 tracks. Building on his "Stick Season" breakthrough and strong critical reception from Pitchfork and NPR, the album's promotional rollout and fan-voted favorite new music status on Billboard have driven overwhelming momentum. Realistic upsets would require a sharp late-week drop in streams or sales amid minimal competition, though the tracking period ends April 30 with charts dropping soon after.

markets.question: Will Douglas Davis win the Newark mayoral election?
markets.description:

This market will resolve according to the candidate who becomes the next mayor of Newark as a result of this election.

Temporary, interim, or placeholder mayors appointed before the election will not be considered.

This market includes any potential second round. If the result of this election isn't known by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting; however, if there is any ambiguity in the results, this market will resolve according to official information from Newark.

eventMetadata.context_description: Incumbent Mayor Ras Baraka's 95% implied probability in the May 12, 2026, Newark nonpartisan mayoral election reflects his strong three-term record of economic development, public safety gains, and recent State of the City address touting city progress, bolstered by a mayor-backed slate's sweep in the school board race last week. Facing seven minor challengers like Louis Shockley (37%), none have gained traction amid absent polls showing competitive threats, underscoring trader consensus on Baraka's machine dominance in the plurality-vote contest. A commanding position persists absent late-breaking scandals, criminal charges, health issues, or unexpected voter turnout surges favoring anti-incumbent sentiment ahead of the upcoming candidate forum.

markets.question: Counter-Strike: Vitality vs G2 (BO3) - BLAST Rivals Group A
markets.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket final match between Vitality and G2 in the BLAST Rivals Group A, initially scheduled for April 30 at 1:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Vitality" if Vitality win the match against G2.

This market will resolve to "G2" if G2 win the match against Vitality.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: Team Vitality, the world #1 on a dominant win streak with a 95% rate over recent months, faces G2 Esports in the BLAST Rivals Spring 2026 Group A winners' match BO3 on April 30 after both opened 1-0. Vitality grinded a 2-1 comeback over FUT Esports, dropping Dust2 11-13 but dominating Mirage and Nuke, extending their momentum from multiple S-tier titles. G2 impressed with a clean 2-0 sweep of Astralis on Dust2, Overpass, and Ancient, signaling recovery from prior slumps. Vitality holds the edge in recent head-to-heads (2-1 win at IEM Rio 2026) and roster strength led by ZywOo, though G2's huNter- and matys pose upset threats in this double-elim group stage, with the winner eyeing playoffs semifinals. Recent CS2 patches like Cache's return could influence map picks.

markets.question: Will CS Cienciano vs. CD Comerciantes Unidos end in a draw?
markets.description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for May 2, 2026
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

events.title: CS Cienciano vs. CD Comerciantes Unidos
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Peru Liga 1 game, scheduled for Saturday, May 2, 2026 between CS Cienciano and CD Comerciantes Unidos.

eventMetadata.context_description: Cienciano's commanding home form at high-altitude Estadio Inca Garcilaso de la Vega in Cusco, where they've secured five wins and one draw without a loss this Liga 1 Apertura season, anchors trader consensus favoring them at 57.5% implied probability. Sitting third in the table ahead of fifth-placed Comerciantes Unidos, Cienciano boasts a dominant head-to-head record with four wins in six meetings and recent momentum from five straight league victories before a 2-2 draw at UTC last weekend. Comerciantes Unidos remain competitive after a 1-0 upset over Sporting Cristal but face away challenges against the altitude and hosts' defense, boosting the draw to 26.5% while limiting their win chance to 18%. Right winger Juan Romagnoli's injury tempers Cienciano slightly, yet no major absences for visitors.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Austin be between 88-89°F on April 29?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Austin-Bergstrom International Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 29 Apr '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Austin-Bergstrom International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/tx/austin/KAUS.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

markets.question: Will monthly inflation increase by ≥1.1% in April?
markets.description:
This is a market about the one-month percent change in the seasonally adjusted Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers (CPI-U) published by the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS).

This market will resolve to the one-month percent change in the seasonally adjusted Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers (CPI-U) in April 2026 according to the monthly BLS report.

The resolution source for this market will be the BLS Consumer Price Index report released for April 2026 (https://www.bls.gov/bls/news-release/cpi.htm), currently scheduled to be released on May 12, 2026, at 8:30 AM ET. Resolution of this market will take place upon release of the aforementioned data.

Note: the resolution source for this market will be the official monthly Consumer Price Index for All Urban Consumers (CPI-U) which BLS reports to one decimal point (e.g. 0.4%). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

If the BLS does not release the relevant figures on the scheduled date, this market may remain open up until the scheduled release time of the next CPI report (https://www.bls.gov/schedule). If the information is not released by that time, this market will resolve according to the figures of the most recent previous month with available data.

markets.question: Game Handicap: TEX (-2.5) vs Toronto KOI (+2.5)
markets.description:
This market refers to the Call of Duty match between Toronto KOI and OpTic Texas in the Call of Duty League Stage 3 Major Qualifiers Qualifiers, initially scheduled for May 2 at 7:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to "OpTic Texas" if OpTic Texas wins 3 or more games than Toronto KOI in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Toronto KOI". 

Games won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the handicap, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching game being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/callofduty/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/callofduty/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.
markets.groupItemTitle: Game Handicap: TEX (-2.5) vs Toronto KOI (+2.5)

events.title: Call of Duty: Toronto KOI vs OpTic Texas (BO5) - Call of Duty League Stage 3 Major Qualifiers Qualifiers
events.description:
This market refers to the Call of Duty match between Toronto KOI and OpTic Texas in the Call of Duty League Stage 3 Major Qualifiers Qualifiers, initially scheduled for May 2 at 7:30PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Toronto KOI" if Toronto KOI win the match against OpTic Texas.

This market will resolve to "OpTic Texas" if OpTic Texas win the match against Toronto KOI.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/callofduty/Main_Page. However, if https://liquipedia.net/callofduty/Main_Page has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: OpTic Texas holds a dominant edge over Toronto KOI in recent head-to-heads, sweeping their last six series 0-6 with a 18-2 map advantage, capped by a 3-1 elimination win in the CDL Minor I tournament on April 25 where Mercules and Shotzzy delivered hardpoint masterclasses on maps like Scar and Den. Both teams entered Stage 3 Major Qualifiers strongly—Toronto KOI at 2-0 (6-2 map record) after wins over Riyadh Falcons and others, OpTic Texas 1-0 (3-1)—fueled by stable rosters featuring Shotzzy, Dashy, Huke, and Mercules for Texas, and Insight, CleanX, JoeDeceives, Kips for KOI. Recent scrims showed competitiveness (e.g., 4-3, 5-5 map splits), but trader consensus reflects Texas' superior form, meta adaptation on Black Ops 6 maps like Gridlock and Exposure, and momentum heading into this BO5 qualifier bracket match.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket assigns a 100% implied probability to a highest temperature of 23°C in Milan on April 29, driven by hourly observations at the resolution station, Milano Malpensa International Airport, which peaked at 23°C around 5 PM local time under partly cloudy conditions with mild southerly winds and moderate humidity. Regional forecasts from ARPA Lombardia and IlMeteo.it converged on this value, citing above-average warmth from continental high pressure but capped by increasing cloud cover and evening showers that prevent further intensification. April climatology typically sees highs near 18–20°C, making today's reading notably warm yet consistent with model outputs from ECMWF and GFS ensembles. Realistic challenges would require an improbable late-afternoon clearance yielding 1–2°C extra heating before sunset, with final station data expected by midnight.

markets.question: Will Nolan McLean win the 2026 NL Cy Young Award?

Michael King trails closely at 27% after anchoring the Padres rotation with a 2.41 ERA, 34 strikeouts, and .177 opponent batting average in 33.2 innings. Shohei Ohtani's successful pitching return (4-1, strong innings totals) and Eury Pérez's quality starts for Miami fuel their 22-23% shares, while Brewers rookie Jacob Misiorowski's franchise-record 11 Opening Day strikeouts propel his 20% odds in this competitive early-season market defined by ace-level peripherals and workload management.

markets.question: Will US crude oil reserves fall to 275M by June 5?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the U.S. Energy Information Administration publishes a weekly figure for U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve less than or equal to the specified value for any week ending on or before June 5, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

This market will resolve as soon as the listed value is reached, or once data has been released for the final week ending on or before June 5, 2026, and the listed value has not been reached.

If data has not been released for the final week ending on or before June 5 2026, by June 12, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve based on the data available at that time.

The primary resolution source for this market will be the U.S. Energy Information Administration, specifically the weekly data published for the U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve at https://www.eia.gov/dnav/pet/hist/LeafHandler.ashx?n=PET&s=WCSSTUS1&f=W.

Note: this market’s resolution source publishes weekly values of U.S. Ending Stocks of Crude Oil in the Strategic Petroleum Reserve in thousands of barrels. Thus, this will be the level of specificity used to resolve this market.

Weekly EIA data shows drawdowns accelerating to 7 million barrels last week, with commercial crude inventories conversely rising to 466 million barrels, 3% above seasonal norms, reflecting high refinery utilization near 90% and record exports. Traders eye further DOE solicitations and geopolitical developments through June 5 EIA report resolution, as summer demand ramps and potential supply recovery could slow the pace.

Persistent late-April highs above 34°C on multiple days highlight the baseline warmth from urban heat island effects and ENSO-neutral conditions transitioning toward weak El Niño, but frequent intense afternoon thundery showers—often localised moderate to heavy—introduce key uncertainty differentiating the closely matched probabilities. Early or widespread cloud cover could cap peaks at 32°C, while patchy late-day rain permits 33°C; upcoming 24-hour forecast refinements will clarify model consensus on shower timing.

markets.question: Spread: AS Monaco FC (-2.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming Ligue 1 game, scheduled for May 2 at 1:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "AS Monaco FC" if AS Monaco FC win the game by 3 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "FC Metz".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on ligue1.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: FC Metz vs. AS Monaco FC - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the Ligue 1 game, scheduled for May 2 at 1:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: FC Metz sit 18th in Ligue 1 with 26 points from 30 matches, mired in a relegation scrap, hosting seventh-placed AS Monaco on May 2 at Stade Saint-Symphorien amid a mounting injury crisis including Maxime Colin (calf), Boubacar Traoré (knee), and Believe Munongo out. Metz's porous defense concedes heavily, worsened by recent struggles against bottom-table rivals. Monaco, with 49 points from 29 games, endured a 4-1 loss to Paris FC last week despite Folarin Balogun extending his scoring streak to nine straight appearances and Paul Pogba's injury return, but remain potent away with an unbeaten run in eight head-to-heads versus Metz, capped by September's 5-2 win. Monaco's long-term absentees like Takumi Minamino (knee) and Mohammed Salisu (cruciate) test depth, yet their form and matchup edge shape trader consensus toward visiting superiority in this table-climbing fixture.

Recent catalysts include semifinal running orders revealed earlier this month, revamped entries like Spain's Lion Ceccah's "Sólo quiero más!" and surging odds for Greece amid rehearsal previews, while Denmark's "Før vi går hjem" holds steady. All 35 participating nations have finalized acts via national selections, but geopolitical boycotts by countries including Spain, the Netherlands, Ireland, Slovenia, and Iceland have shrunk the field. Critical upcoming events—first rehearsals this week, jury shows, and televote-heavy semis—could spark momentum shifts, as historical patterns show juries favoring ballads while public votes boost anthems.

markets.question: U.S. enacts AI safety bill before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if a bill that includes at least one of the following provisions is signed into federal law in the United States  by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. 

- Prohibition on Creation or Release: Forbids the creation or release of specific AI systems or models.

- Training Restrictions: Sets limits on how AI systems can be trained, such as restricting access to previously available training data or imposing a maximum limit on the number of parameters used for training.

- Usage Restrictions:  Prevents AI systems from being used in certain applications, such as interacting with customers, interfacing with other applications, or performing actions on the web.

- Human-in-the-Loop Requirements: Requires AI systems to include mechanisms ensuring human oversight or involvement in their operation.

Otherwise this market will resolve to "No". 

The resolution source will be official U.S. federal government (e.g., Congress.gov) however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

events.title: U.S. enacts AI safety bill before 2027?
events.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if a bill that includes at least one of the following provisions is signed into federal law in the United States  by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. 

- Prohibition on Creation or Release: Forbids the creation or release of specific AI systems or models.

- Training Restrictions: Sets limits on how AI systems can be trained, such as restricting access to previously available training data or imposing a maximum limit on the number of parameters used for training.

- Usage Restrictions:  Prevents AI systems from being used in certain applications, such as interacting with customers, interfacing with other applications, or performing actions on the web.

- Human-in-the-Loop Requirements: Requires AI systems to include mechanisms ensuring human oversight or involvement in their operation.

Otherwise this market will resolve to "No". 

The resolution source will be official U.S. federal government (e.g., Congress.gov) however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices "No" at 86% due to the absence of federal momentum for stringent AI safety legislation in the divided 119th Congress, where no bill matching resolution criteria—such as prohibitions on AI model creation, training restrictions, usage bans, or mandatory human-in-the-loop requirements—has advanced beyond introduction. Recent bipartisan efforts, including Reps. Lieu and Obernolte's April 27 American Leadership in AI Act consolidating prior proposals and Senate bills targeting child AI chatbot restrictions and deepfake distribution, focus on innovation promotion and narrow protections rather than comprehensive safety mandates. The Trump administration's March National AI Policy Framework emphasizes light-touch regulation and state preemption, while states enact their own measures amid federal inaction, leaving slim odds for enactment by December 31, 2026.

markets.question: Will US withdraw from NATO by June 30?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the United States formally initiates a withdrawal from NATO or provides an official notice of denunciation to NATO by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

A notice of denunciation refers to the submission of a notice of withdrawal as per Article 13 of the North Atlantic Treaty.

Any action meeting these criteria will qualify for a “Yes” resolution regardless of if its implementation is immediately halted or delayed by judicial or other actions.

The U.S.'s exit from NATO’s integrated military command structure will not be sufficient to resolve this market to "Yes". 

The resolution source will be official information from the US government and NATO, however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: President Trump's early April 2026 interviews threatening to reconsider U.S. NATO membership—amid European allies' refusal to deploy ships to the Strait of Hormuz or back U.S. actions in the Iran conflict—have fueled trader speculation on withdrawal risks. White House statements confirmed the administration weighed an exit, with Secretary of State Marco Rubio criticizing NATO basing rights as a "one-way street" and signaling potential U.S. troop pullbacks from Europe. However, a 2024 bipartisan law prohibits unilateral presidential withdrawal, requiring a two-thirds Senate vote or congressional act under Article 13 of the North Atlantic Treaty, which mandates one-year notice. Bipartisan congressional support for the alliance remains strong, tempering odds despite ongoing foreign policy tensions; no formal process has advanced, with NATO summits potentially influencing future diplomacy.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the MD-06 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the MD-06 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

markets.question: Will Baidu have the second best AI model at the end of May 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the company that owns the model that has the second-highest arena rank based on the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard (https://lmarena.ai/) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on May 31, 2026, 12:00 PM ET.

Results from the "Rank" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

Models will be ordered primarily by their leaderboard rank at the market’s check time. If two or more models are tied on rank, they will be ordered by their Arena score, including any underlying, unrounded, granular values reflected in the data below the leaderboard. If a tie remains, alphabetical order of company names as listed in this market group will be used as a final tiebreaker (e.g., if the two models are tied by exact arena score, “Google” would be ranked ahead of “xAI”). This market will resolve based on the company that occupies second place under this ranking system.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at https://lmarena.ai/. If this resolution source is unavailable at check time, this market will remain open until the leaderboard comes back online and will resolve based on the first check after it becomes available. If it becomes permanently unavailable, this market will resolve based on another resolution source.
